title: ISSS626 Geospatial Analytics & Applications
text:
Welcome to my Page!
This website is crafted as part of a module’s requirement for the Master’s programme (Visual Analytics & Application) under the esteemed guidance of A/Prof KAM Tin Seong.

title: GeoSpatial Analytics
text:
Hello there! Welcome to my portfolio! :)
I’m  Joshua TING
A Master of IT in Business (Analytics) student with Singapore Management University
Before pursuing my Master’s degree, I worked as a healthcare professional in a restructured hospital. Prior to that, I obtained a Bachelor of Science in Nursing from the Singapore Institute of Technology through their university Scholars’ Programme.
